title: calamus oxleyoides
intro: Calamus oxleyoides, also known as Indian calamus, is a plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, and is native to India and other parts of Asia. It is a rhizomatous perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of calamus oxleyoides include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as digestive issues like diarrhea and indigestion. Calamus oxleyoides is often prepared as a powder, extract, or oil, which can be used to make herbal teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health benefits.
